name: Sol's Jewelry and Pawn
description_short: Kansas City jewelry pawn specialist offering immediate cash loans for gold, silver, platinum, and diamonds with no credit checks required.
description_long:
Sol's Jewelry & Pawn is a family-owned pawn shop based in Kansas City that has operated for over 30 years. The business distinguishes itself by specializing exclusively in jewelry pawns rather than general merchandise, allowing them to focus expertise on high-value items. They operate two locations—one in Kansas City, Kansas (913-371-4043) and one in Overland Park (913-499-7233)—with consistent hours Monday-Friday 9:30am-5:30pm and Saturday 10am-3pm. The company employs two GIA-certified jewelers on-site and maintains a stable, highly trained staff with tenure exceeding 15 years.

Sol's primary services include pawn loans against jewelry, outright purchase of jewelry and coins, and retail sale of jewelry inventory. They buy gold, silver, platinum, and diamond jewelry, as well as gold coins, scrap gold, and sterling silver sets. Beyond transactions, they offer jewelry repair and jewelry layaway programs. Their retail jewelry store features 20% discounts on select gold, silver, and diamond pieces, plus specialty categories including religious jewelry, baby and children's jewelry, wedding rings, and chains.

The company differentiates itself through several claimed advantages: immediate cash disbursement ("in minutes"), no credit checks, competitive pricing claims ("best prices paid in the Kansas City area"), and emphasis on expertise-driven valuations. Their marketing positions them as "one of the oldest & most trusted pawn shops in Kansas City" and highlights positive Google and Facebook reviews.

Limitations are inherent to pawn shop business models rather than company-specific deficiencies. The website does not disclose specific loan-to-value ratios, interest rates, or redemption timelines—standard terms that borrowers should clarify before engaging. Pawn lending involves forfeiture risk if loans aren't repaid, and valuations depend on current spot prices for precious metals and gemstones, which fluctuate. The business serves primarily the Kansas City metro area with only two physical locations.
pros: Specializes exclusively in jewelry pawns, providing focused expertise rather than general pawn services
Two GIA-certified jewelers on-site to evaluate items accurately
Claims immediate cash disbursement in minutes with no credit checks required
Family-owned and operated for over 30 years with stable long-term staff (15+ years tenure)
Accepts precious metals (gold, silver, platinum) and diamonds, plus coins and scrap materials
Offers additional services including jewelry repair and layaway programs
Retail jewelry store with 20% discount inventory available for purchase
cons: Website does not disclose loan-to-value ratios, interest rates, redemption periods, or specific loan terms
Limited geographic availability (only 2 locations in Kansas City metro area)
Pawn lending involves forfeiture risk—failure to repay results in loss of collateral
Valuations subject to fluctuating precious metal spot prices and gemstone market conditions
No online application or remote appraisal process mentioned; must visit physical location
best_for: Individuals needing immediate short-term cash against jewelry or precious metals without credit assessment
Sellers of scrap gold, sterling silver, coins, or diamond jewelry seeking fair market-rate buyouts
Customers seeking jewelry repair or interested in purchasing discounted jewelry inventory
diagnosis: Sol's is ideal for consumers in the Kansas City metro area who own jewelry or precious metals and need immediate cash without credit approval, trusting a specialized jeweler's evaluation. The primary caveat is that pawn lending requires surrendering collateral if loans aren't repaid, and the website omits critical loan terms (rates, LTV, redemption windows) that should be clarified directly with the shop before committing.
services: Pawn loans against gold, silver, platinum, and diamond jewelry
Direct purchase of jewelry and precious metals
Gold coin and scrap gold buying
